zh.lifeSummary: 當Gisèle de Vaudémont於大約1090年出生在法國德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特時，她的父親Gérard Ier de Vaudémont35歲，母親Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg22歲。她於1120年之前與Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1141年12月26日在法國德 艾斯特阿爾登斯巴-利斯-布詹希享年52歲，埋葬在法國德 艾斯特姆斯沙吉米爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gisèle de Vaudémont于大约1090年出生在法国德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特时，她的父亲Gérard Ier de Vaudémont35岁，母亲Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg22岁。她于1120年之前与Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1141年12月26日在法国德 艾斯特阿爾登斯巴-利斯-布詹希享年52岁，埋葬在法国德 艾斯特姆斯沙吉米爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gisèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

variants.name: Gisella
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gisèle de Vaudémont was born about 1090, in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, her father, Gérard Ier de Vaudémont, was 35 and her mother, Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg, was 22. She married Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar before 1120. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 26 December 1141, in Bar-lès-Buzancy, Ardennes, Grand Est, France, at the age of 52, and was buried in Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Grand Est, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gisèle de Vaudémont est née environ 1090, à Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, son père, Gérard Ier de Vaudémont, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar avant 1120. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 décembre 1141, à Bar-lès-Buzancy, Ardennes, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Grand Est, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gisèle de Vaudémont um 1090 in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gérard Ier de Vaudémont 35 und ihre Mutter Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg 22. Sie hat vor 1120 Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Dezember 1141 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Bar-lès-Buzancy, Ardennes, Großer Osten, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Großer Osten, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gisèle de Vaudémont è nata il circa 1090 nel Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Gérard Ier de Vaudémont, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar prima del 1120. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 dicembre 1141, nel Bar-lès-Buzancy, Ardennes, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Gisèle de Vaudémontが約1090年にフランスグランド エストメウルスエ-エト-モセルヴァウドeモントで生まれた時，父Gérard Ier de Vaudémontは35歳，母Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburgは22歳であった。1120年以前にRenaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Barと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1141年12月26日にフランスグランド エストアルデンスバー-ルeス-ブザンシで52歳で死去し，フランスグランド エストメウゼサイント-ミヒエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gisèle de Vaudémont(이)가 대략 1090년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우르테-트-모셀 바드e몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gérard Ier de Vaudémont(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1120년 이전 Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1141년 12월 26일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 아데네스 바-e스-버자시에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우스 세인트-미히얼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gisèle de Vaudémont nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Gérard Ier de Vaudémont, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar antes 1120. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de dezembro de 1141, em Bar-lès-Buzancy, Ardennes, Grand Est, França, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Grand Est, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gisèle de Vaudémont родилась около 1090 г. в местности ваудeмонт, меурте-ет-моселл, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Gérard Ier de Vaudémont было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar перед 1120 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 26 декабря 1141 г. в местности бар-лeс-бузанси, арденнесь, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-михиел, меус, гранд эст, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gisèle de Vaudémont nació aproximadamente 1090, en Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Gérard Ier de Vaudémont, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar antes de 1120. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de diciembre de 1141, en Bar-lès-Buzancy, Ardennes, Grand Est, Francia, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia.
